prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次分别为6101→6447→7217→6563→6404，整体呈波动上升后略有回落趋势；2023年达到峰值7217后连续两年前移，2025年基准约6404名。 2021-2025年招生计划分别为161→167→169→170→176人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划174人，较2025年减少2人，缩招约1.1%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第34位，近年排名稳定在33-34位，属于中上985层次；2026年声誉偏负面（实验室爆炸 致1死3伤事件），可能轻微影响考生报考意愿；抖音热度排名第23位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，整体关注度中等偏上；土木工程A+、机械工程A-、电气工程 A-、环境科学与工程A-、风景园林学A-；其中电气工程、机械工程与招生大类（工科试验班电气信息类、工程能源类）直接对应，学科实力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工 程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）等热门专业持续升温；安徽省2026年高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年（约46.2万）略有下降，物理 类考生估算约31.3万（较2025年32.1万略降），竞争压力小幅缓解；重庆大学位于重庆市，与安徽省地理距离适中；该校在安徽招生规模较大（约174人），属 省外重点生源省份，无显著地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划小幅缩招（-2人）、考生总数略降、声誉偏负面等因素， 考虑考生总数下降带来的竞争缓解及热门工科专业持续高热，位次预计小幅前移；预测最低位次约6330名，区间5830-6830名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 6101 → 6447 → 7217 → 6563 → 6404, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend followed by a slight decline; the peak was 7217 in 2023, then moved forward for two consecutive years, with a baseline of approximately 6404 in 2025. Enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 161 → 167 → 169 → 170 → 176, with a gradual small-scale expansion; the 2026 plan is 174, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a reduction of about 1.1%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 34th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking of 33-34 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities; the 2026 reputation is slightly negative (laboratory explosion causing 1 death and 3 injuries), which may mildly affect candidates' willingness to apply; ranked 23rd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, overall attention is moderately high; Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-; among them, Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering directly correspond to the enrollment categories (Engineering Experimental Class Electrical Information, Engineering Energy), with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended) continue to heat up; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Gaokao is approximately 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 313,000 (slightly down from 321,000 in 2025), slightly easing competitive pressure; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, with a moderate geographical distance from Anhui Province; the university has a large enrollment scale in Anhui (about 174), making it a key source province outside the region, with no significant regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the slight reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (-2), a slight decrease in total candidates, and a slightly negative reputation, along with the easing of competition due to the decline in candidate numbers and the sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors, the ranking is expected to move forward slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6330, with a range of 5830-6830.
